annotation: Product overview: user tiers (free/basic/premium), core metrics (DAU/revenue/chat), platform breakdown, market context.
Core metric definitions: DAU, new users, revenue, chat sessions, D1 retention. Includes source tables, calculation rules, and common drill-down dimensions.
Table reference guide: users, events, daily_metrics, user_daily_activity, experiments. Key columns, relationships, and recommended usage patterns.
